title: Eclipse S-CORE - Communication: gateway application configuration schema

forwarded-services.title: Service instances to forward
forwarded-services.description: List of instance specifiers that will be forwarded by this gateway instance

items.title: Instance specifier
items.description: Instance specifier that will be forwarded

expected-received-services.title: Service instances to receive
expected-received-services.description: Whitelist of service instance specifiers that shall be received by this gateway.

items.title: Instance specifier
items.description: Instance specifier that shall be received

transport-layer.title: Transport layer reference
transport-layer.description: Identifies which transport layer implementation to use and where its configuration lives.

id.title: Transport layer identifier
id.description: Unique identifier for the transport layer implementation (e.g. sample_hypervisor).

config-path.title: Transport configuration path
config-path.description: Absolute path to the transport-layer-specific configuration JSON file.
